message:
Add comprehensive testing infrastructure for sqlmodel-pool and sqlmodel-query

- Added 20 new tests for sqlmodel-pool covering:
  - Pool creation, config, stats, close, at_capacity
  - PooledConnection deref, deref_mut, detach, drop behavior
  - ConnectionMeta timing and touch functionality
  - PoolInner can_create_new and stats
  - Full mock Connection implementation for testing

- Added 22 new tests for sqlmodel-query Select builder covering:
  - Basic SELECT * and specific columns
  - DISTINCT queries
  - WHERE filters (simple, multiple AND, OR)
  - ORDER BY (ASC, DESC, multiple columns)
  - LIMIT and OFFSET pagination
  - GROUP BY and HAVING clauses
  - FOR UPDATE locking
  - JOIN types (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, multiple)
  - Complex query combinations
  - Clone and Default implementations

- All 229 workspace tests pass across 7 crates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
